# 🧩 DSA Pattern Recognition Tree

> Analyze your problem's inputs, data structures, and constraints to isolate the optimal algorithmic execution pattern.

- [🧩 DSA Pattern Recognition Tree](https://github.io/readme.md): 🧩 DSA Pattern Recognition Tree

## Patterns

- [Sliding Window Core Pattern](https://github.io/patterns/sliding-window.md): The Sliding Window pattern converts nested loops into a single linear pass by maintaining a continuous sub-segment ("window") over an array or string that expands or contracts dynamically based on problem criteria.
- [Two-Pointer Optimization Pattern](https://github.io/patterns/two-pointer.md): The Two-Pointer technique optimizes search boundaries by managing two independent index references that move toward each other or in tandem, bypassing the need for nested O(n^2) loops.
